name: @migration-utility/evals
description: Promptfoo eval harness for skill testing

scripts.postrestore: git checkout -- fixtures/ && git clean -fd fixtures/
scripts.eval: npm run prerestore && promptfoo eval --no-cache; npm run postrestore
scripts.eval:profiling-table: npm run prerestore && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/profiling-table/skill-profiling-table.yaml; npm run postrestore
scripts.eval:generating-model: npm run prerestore && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/generating-model/skill-generating-model.yaml; npm run postrestore
scripts.eval:generating-tests: npm run prerestore && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/generating-tests/skill-generating-tests.yaml; npm run postrestore
scripts.eval:reviewing-tests: npm run prerestore && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/reviewing-tests/skill-reviewing-tests.yaml; npm run postrestore
scripts.eval:reviewing-model: npm run prerestore && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/reviewing-model/skill-reviewing-model.yaml; npm run postrestore
scripts.eval:analyzing-table: npm run prerestore && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/analyzing-table/skill-analyzing-table.yaml; npm run postrestore
scripts.eval:cmd-scope: npm run prerestore && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/cmd-scope/cmd-scope.yaml; npm run postrestore
scripts.eval:cmd-profile: npm run prerestore && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/cmd-profile/cmd-profile.yaml; npm run postrestore
scripts.eval:cmd-generate-model: npm run prerestore && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/cmd-generate-model/cmd-generate-model.yaml; npm run postrestore
scripts.eval:cmd-generate-tests: npm run prerestore && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/cmd-generate-tests/cmd-generate-tests.yaml; npm run postrestore
scripts.eval:cmd-status: npm run prerestore && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/cmd-status/cmd-status.yaml; npm run postrestore
scripts.eval:refactoring-sql: npm run prerestore && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/refactoring-sql/skill-refactoring-sql.yaml; npm run postrestore
scripts.eval:cmd-refactor: npm run prerestore && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/cmd-refactor/cmd-refactor.yaml; npm run postrestore
